A '''survival knife''' was a [[Knife/Legends|small handheld bladed weapon]] that could also be used as a multipurpose [[survival tool]]. The handle was hollowed out which allowed for the storage of very small items used for survival like a [[fire rod]], a short length of wire, or an [[Energy cell/Legends|energy cell]]. It also had a built-in digital compass. The survival knife was used by [[Scout/Legends|explorers]] and issued to military [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] in case they were shot down and survived their vehicles' destruction and needed to survive in a hostile environment. Like the combat knife, the survival knife was crafted so that it could be used effectively as a thrown weapon.<ref name="The Unknown Regions" />

The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] used a survival knife.
